zh.Acton and Old Felton, Northumberland, En: 英國諾圖波藍德阿克頓 安德 笛卡爾 費爾頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Acton於1377年出生在英國諾圖波藍德阿克頓 安德 笛卡爾 費爾頓時，他的父親Lawrence Acton25歲，母親Bridget Hamilton23歲。他於1400年與Elizabeth Sturmyn在英國諾圖波藍德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.Acton and Old Felton, Northumberland, En: 英国諾圖波藍德阿克頓 安德 笛卡爾 費爾頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Acton于1377年出生在英国諾圖波藍德阿克頓 安德 笛卡爾 費爾頓时，他的父亲Lawrence Acton25岁，母亲Bridget Hamilton23岁。他于1400年与Elizabeth Sturmyn在英国諾圖波藍德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Acton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places, especially in Shropshire and adjacent counties, named Acton. Generally, these are from Old English āc ‘oak’ + tūn ‘settlement’. In Ireland the surname has been established in Connacht since the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Acton was born in 1377, in Acton and Old Felton, Northumberland, England, his father, Lawrence Acton, was 25 and his mother, Bridget Hamilton, was 23. He married Elizabeth Sturmyn in 1400, in Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in his hometown.

fr.Acton and Old Felton, Northumberland, En: Acton and Old Felton, Northumberland, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Acton est né en 1377, à Acton and Old Felton, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Lawrence Acton, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Bridget Hamilton, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Sturmyn en 1400, à Northumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale.

de.Acton and Old Felton, Northumberland, En: Acton and Old Felton, Northumberland, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Acton 1377 in Acton and Old Felton, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lawrence Acton 25 und seine Mutter Bridget Hamilton 23. Er hat 1400 in Northumberland, England Elizabeth Sturmyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb in seinem Geburtsort.

ja.Acton and Old Felton, Northumberland, En: イギリスノースウンバーランドアクトン アンド オルド フエルトン
ja.Northumberland, England: イギリスノースウンバーランド
ja.lifeSummary: Richard Actonが1377年にイギリスノースウンバーランドアクトン アンド オルド フエルトンで生まれた時，父Lawrence Actonは25歳，母Bridget Hamiltonは23歳であった。1400年にイギリスノースウンバーランドでElizabeth Sturmynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は故郷で死去した。

ko.Acton and Old Felton, Northumberland, En: 영국 노르스벌랜드 악턴 앤드 드 프턴
ko.lifeSummary: Richard Acton(이)가 1377년 영국 노르스벌랜드 악턴 앤드 드 프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lawrence Acton(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Bridget Hamilton(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1400년 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 Elizabeth Sturmyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Sturmyn em 1400, em Northumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.Acton and Old Felton, Northumberland, En: актон анд олд фелтон, нортумбирланд, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Acton родился в 1377 г. в местности актон анд олд фелтон, нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Lawrence Acton было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Bridget Hamilton, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Sturmyn в 1400 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в его родном городе.
